channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Wednesday, April 08
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 06:35 PM (1.748 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 02:53 AM (-0.151 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: NE 15 mph
